allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("py", "python3", "C:\\Python311\\python.exe", "C:\\Python312\\python.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { try { & $p --version 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Host "FOUND: $p"; break } catch { Write-Host "MISS: $p" } })
